title: Email Integration Tab under Profile area
excerpt: Under the profile area there used to be a tab called Email Integration. This allowed you to create an email address that allowed anyone to post updates to an item. This tab seems to have disappeared. We use this as a C…

posts.author: darrylclark (Darryl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Under the profile area there used to be a tab called Email Integration. This allowed you to create an email address that allowed anyone to post updates to an item. This tab seems to have disappeared. We use this as a CC in emails to allow non-users and non-guests email replies to be directly added as an update to a pulse.

Any idea where this has gone?
